name: Golden Lemon Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Eagle Brand sweetened milk (not evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cheese until fluffy in a mixer bowl.
2. Gradually beat in cream cheese, sweetened milk, lemon juice, and vanilla extract until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Prepare golden lemon topping by combining sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan.
5. Add water, real lemon juice, egg yolk; mix well.
6. Cook over medium heat until thickened.
7. Remove from heat and stir in margarine or butter until melted.
8. Pour the golden lemon topping over the pie filling.
